name: parity
description: WDK's worklet RPC is **HRPC** over **`compact-encoding`** (binary). To guarantee the Dart codec matches Tether's exactly, we treat the real JS encoder as the **oracle**: `oracle.mjs` runs the actual `@tetherto/wdk-react-native-provider` secret-manager codecs and emits byte-exact vectors; the Dart test (`packages/wdk_flutter/test/hrpc_parity_test.dart`) asserts our port reproduces them.
